config_meta.notes: First school_district jurisdiction. Spike (2026-06-04) found: minutes posted as Google Docs on an Edlio page (export?format=pdf works via redirect; some links are 410-Gone dead docs); agendas page is EMPTY (no documents) -> expect an agenda_missing finding under OCGA 50-14-1(e)(1) and NO live forums for CCSD until agendas are posted.

records_custodian.name: Open Records Officer
records_custodian.title: Columbia County School District
records_custodian.notes: District open-records officer name/email not yet confirmed; needs an open-records lookup before comment digests can be emailed. Not blocking — CCSD has no agendas/forums yet.

officials_roster.notes: Board of Education member directory. Verify member count + posts/districts during first onboarding pass.

meeting_agendas_minutes.notes: Minutes only. Each minutes link is a Google Doc; fetch via /export?format=pdf (civic_get follows the googleusercontent redirect). Agendas are NOT posted as documents (empty agendas page) -> agenda_missing finding.

campaign_finance.notes: Elected Board of Education members file campaign disclosures; pre-2027 destination TBD.

public_comment_policy.deadline: one week prior to the regular meeting
public_comment_policy.exclusions: disciplinary/under-review matters; off-topic, irrelevant, repetitious, or derogatory comments ruled out of order
public_comment_policy.notes: Policy-based, not statutory (OMA does not mandate public comment). Context for the forum config; not an audit finding.

known_gaps.explanation: CCSD does not post board meeting agendas as accessible documents (agendas page is empty). OCGA 50-14-1(e)(1) requires the agenda to be available. Verified by spike 2026-06-04.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Columbia County School District does not appear to publish its board meeting agendas online; only minutes are posted.
known_gaps.remediation: Surfaced automatically as an agenda_missing finding.
